flashcards.definition: An identity is true for ALL valid θ; an equation may be true only for specific θ.
Transform one side to match the other; never move terms across the equals sign.
Replace tan, sec, csc, cot with sin θ and cos θ expressions.
Multiply numerator & denominator by (1 + sinθ) or (1 − cosθ) to simplify.
Look for Pythagorean patterns, common factors, or difference of squares.
